name: Multi-Agent CrewAI Orchestration
desc: Architected a hierarchical system where a manager agent dynamically delegates IDV, OCR, and face-match tasks to specialists via custom MCP tools.

name: Sleuth: AI Forensic Accounting
desc: Built a 'RAG-lite' investigator that explains ledger discrepancies by matching structured data with unstructured context like emails and Slack logs.

name: Kueri: Text-to-SQL Engine
desc: A modular interface using LangGraph and MCP servers to let non-technical users query databases via natural language.
impact: Zero SQL knowledge required for data insights

name: LangGraph Agent Framework
desc: Engineered stateful execution graphs for complex, multi-turn AI reasoning loops and supervisor-led delegation patterns.

name: Multi-Doc RAG Agents
desc: Orchestrated CrewAI agents that intelligently select between specialized FAISS-backed RAG tools for policy and protocol analysis.

name: Loopify: Batch API Automation
desc: A high-speed batch testing tool that processes CSV-based API requests with configurable delays and real-time result tracking.
impact: Reduced testing time from 15 mins to 15 seconds
